data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for payment terms.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the payment terms (Net-15, Net-30, upon completion). However, the evidence provided does not include specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or validated. While the linked use case mentions that payment is scheduled Net-15, it lacks concrete evidence or endpoints to support the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of payment terms being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for payment terms
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the payment terms.
